title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. VLCC Market Under Pressure Amid Summer Lull and Weak Demand - Despite some mid-May signs of rate stabilization that briefly lifted sentiment, the end of May paints a negative picture for the VLCC freight market across both Eastern and Western routes.
